name: scalepoint-skills
description: ScalePoint M&A internal Claude Code skills — report format, seller sub-ICP, meeting CRM logging, and more.

plugins.name: scalepoint-report-format
plugins.description: Produces boardroom-quality, brand-compliant ScalePoint PDFs (CIMs, teasers, valuation reports, brochures, proposals) using ReportLab.

plugins.name: scalepoint-seller-subicp
plugins.description: Identify a seller's Sub-ICP (A-G) during intake conversations and route through the Match Matrix.

plugins.name: scalepoint-meeting-crm
plugins.description: Transcribe a meeting recording and populate a seller deal or buyer profile in HubSpot. Handles audio files via whisper and pasted transcripts.
